coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 16:15 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 70% for 16:15. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 16:15 at 70%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 0% done. 47 minutes left. This feels like cheating. It's not. It's science. Probably.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/1. 7:48 at threshold. Get comfortable being uncomfortable.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1: 100% FTP for 7:48. 85-100 rpm, Seated. This should feel 'comfortably hard.'
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/1. 7:48 at 100%. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/1. 7:48 in the space between 'fine' and 'please make it stop.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1: 100% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Find your rhythm. Don't overcook the start.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/1. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 2 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1: 7:48 at 100%. This is your lactate threshold — challenging but repeatable.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Set 1: 7:48 at 100%. Every minute here makes you faster on race day.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/1. Your legs are politely requesting a break. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/1. Comfortably hard. Breathe deep. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 50% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 24 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 31 minutes in. 100% at 85-100 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 50% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 1 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 50% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 50% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 100%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last threshold block. 100% FTP. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last block. 100-100% FTP, 85-100 rpm. After this: 16min cooldown.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 16min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final block! 7:48 at 100%. The light at the end of the tunnel. It's probably more threshold work.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last threshold interval. 100% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 74% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 31min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 47 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 47 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 16:15. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
